title: phagnalon calycinum subsp. spathulatum
intro: Phagnalon calycinum subsp. spathulatum is a plant species within the daisy family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
